title: Audit PPO/eval/DDP correctness and add regression tests

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Starting correctness audit of PPO, eval, DDP, seeding, and train/eval consistency before further experiments.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented correctness fixes for SAME_STEP vector env handling, truncation-aware bootstrap, deterministic main-rank eval, weighted episode metrics, checkpoint resume, and added regression tests. pytest is green.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed PPO/eval/DDP audit and fixes. Added SAME_STEP env handling, truncation bootstrap from final_obs, deterministic rank-0 eval with broadcast, checkpoint resume with RNG state, weighted episode metrics, and regression tests. pytest is green.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed PPO/env/eval audit and fixes. Corrected SAME_STEP autoreset handling, truncation bootstrap from final_obs, non-overlapping reset seeds, rank-0 deterministic evaluation/broadcast, weighted episode metric reduction, checkpoint resume/RNG restore, and config override persistence. Added regression tests. Verification: pytest -q passes (DDP smoke skips when loopback sockets are unavailable in this environment).

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented SARE asymmetric routed experts with route entropy, path coverage, and expert load metrics. Verified one-update smoke run.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented TREG-H with second-hop routing, halting head, transition bias, and ponder penalty. Verified one-update smoke run.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented SRW with unary routed experts, salient-token selection, and gated relational attention. Verified one-update smoke run.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented POR with persistent differentiable option state, termination, duration tracking, and switch-rate metrics. Verified one-update smoke run.

title: MiniGrid baseline recovery and routing re-evaluation

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Recovery epic completed. The smoke/falsification lane remains in configs/baseline/ and the original ablation scripts; the canonical recovery lane now lives in configs/diagnostic/ and configs/experiments/. Verification included pytest -q in the repo uv environment plus all-GPU smoke verification of scripts/run_tiny_overfit.sh, scripts/run_minigrid_sanity_suite.sh, scripts/run_minigrid_baseline_suite.sh, and scripts/run_sare_comparison_sweep.sh with PSMN_MAX_UPDATES=1. Durable local reports were generated under outputs/reports/.

title: Baseline solvability and PPO audit campaign

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Starting the control-first audit/fix campaign: PPO correctness first, then sanity-tier overfit and stronger controls.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed the control-first PPO audit campaign. The harness is now trustworthy enough for baseline solvability work: Empty solves for flat/token dense, DoorKey solves for flat_dense, and matched SARE still loses on DoorKey.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed the control-first PPO audit campaign. Easy-task overfit and sanity tiers now work, fully observed DoorKey is solved by a tuned token_dense control, and partial DoorKey/Memory expose a greedy-vs-sampled evaluation mismatch that must be resolved before fair routed comparisons.

title: Add MiniGrid sanity tier and tiny overfit protocol

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Starting sanity-tier and overfit experiments with flat_dense and token_dense using the new configs and scripts.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added sanity-tier configs and scripts, plus tiny overfit protocol. Empty-5x5 now solves for flat_dense and token_dense in the sanity sweep; overfit report saved at overfit_report.md and outputs/experiments/minigrid_overfit/.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added configs/minigrid/sanity/, scripts/run_minigrid_overfit.sh, scripts/run_minigrid_sanity_sweep.sh, and overfit_report.md. Verified overfit on MiniGrid-Empty-5x5-v0: flat_dense and token_dense both reached greedy eval_success_rate 1.0; sanity sweep also solved Empty-5x5 for both controls.

title: Add recurrent baseline and stronger control configs

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed by adding token_gru, configs/minigrid/baseline/*, and recurrent control coverage in tests.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed fair SARE rerun lane cleanup. Canonical routed retest config is configs/experiments/minigrid_doorkey_sare.yaml and canonical script is scripts/run_sare_comparison_sweep.sh, restricted to DoorKey where a control already learns under the accepted longer-run evidence. Existing matched rerun evidence is summarized in outputs/reports/minigrid_sare_report.md, and the new script was smoke-verified on all visible GPUs with PSMN_MAX_UPDATES=1.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed easy-env sanity suite lane split. Canonical configs now live under configs/diagnostic/, canonical script is scripts/run_minigrid_sanity_suite.sh, and grouped markdown/CSV reports are generated via src/psmn_rl/analysis/summarize.py. Current long-run sanity evidence is captured in outputs/reports/minigrid_sanity_report.md; the new script was also smoke-verified on all visible GPUs with PSMN_MAX_UPDATES=1.

title: Audit PPO/eval/DDP correctness and add targeted tests
Bootstrap repo, environment, and Beads workflow
close_reason: done: repo bootstrapped with uv/Python 3.12, Beads initialized, AGENTS updated, and project skeleton created

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Initialized git, created .venv with Python 3.12 via uv, ran bd init, and began repo bootstrap.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Bootstrapped git, uv Python 3.12 environment, bd init, packaging, scripts, AGENTS.md, and seeded the Beads graph.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented flattened/tokenized MiniGrid baselines, configs, entrypoints, and verified token-dense smoke training on MiniGrid DoorKey.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented the tokenized single-expert control using the routed-expert dataflow with a single shared expert.

title: Implement PPO + DDP training stack
close_reason: done: PPO + DDP stack implemented and validated with a torchrun smoke test

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Implemented PPO rollout storage, GAE, optimizer step, logging, checkpointing, and DDP-safe execution. Verified with pytest DDP smoke and torch.distributed.run.

title: Integrate MiniGrid experiments
close_reason: done: MiniGrid integration implemented and training smoke commands succeed

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Integrated MiniGrid vector environments and token observation handling. Verified one-update MiniGrid smoke runs for dense and routed variants.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed reporting upgrade. src/psmn_rl/analysis/summarize.py now accepts run roots, emits grouped markdown tables by env/variant/seed, separates fully observed runs, computes train/eval gaps and best-train signals, and can export CSV. Generated local reports under outputs/reports/: overfit_report.md, minigrid_sanity_report.md, minigrid_baseline_report.md, and minigrid_sare_report.md.

title: Add MiniGrid sanity tier and tiny overfit protocol

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed baseline-lane reconciliation. Stronger control configs now live under configs/experiments/ for DoorKey, KeyCorridor, and DynamicObstacles without touching configs/baseline/. Canonical script is scripts/run_minigrid_baseline_suite.sh. The recurrent token_gru path is now explicitly documented as diagnostic-only until sequence-aware PPO batching exists. Long-run control evidence is summarized in outputs/reports/minigrid_baseline_report.md; the new script was smoke-verified on all visible GPUs with PSMN_MAX_UPDATES=1.

title: Run sanity and hard-task control sweeps, update reports

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed sanity dense sweep, hard-task dense sweep, matched DoorKey SARE rerun, and updated root-level report.md/summary.md/overfit_report.md with conclusions.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Ran the control-first experiment set and wrote root-level summaries. Key evidence: overfit_report.md, outputs/minigrid/overfit/summary.md, outputs/minigrid/sanity_sweep/summary.md, outputs/minigrid/diagnostic_runs/doorkey_fullobs_token_dense_tuned/summary.md, outputs/minigrid/main_runs/doorkey_token_dense_tuned/summary.md, outputs/minigrid/diagnostic_runs/eval_mode_checks.md.

title: Update experiment scripts and reporting for control-first comparisons

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed new control-first scripts and reporting docs: run_minigrid_overfit.sh, run_minigrid_sanity_dense.sh, run_minigrid_hard_dense.sh, run_minigrid_sare_compare.sh, README.md, AGENTS.md, summary.md, report.md, overfit_report.md.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added scripts/run_minigrid_control_sweep.sh, scripts/run_sare_comparison_sweep.sh, scripts/eval_policy_modes.sh, and updated README/AGENTS/report.md/summary.md/overfit_report.md for the control-first harness.

title: Audit PPO correctness and baseline solvability harness

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed tiny-overfit lane split. Canonical configs now live under configs/diagnostic/, canonical script is scripts/run_tiny_overfit.sh, and the accepted overfit artifact was regenerated into outputs/reports/overfit_report.md from outputs/minigrid/overfit. Smoke verification of the new script completed with PSMN_MAX_UPDATES=1.

title: Milestone 3: Procgen + analysis
close_reason: done: Procgen integration and ablation artifacts completed; milestone closed with verification evidence

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Metrics, tests, and README are complete. Remaining open work is Procgen integration and running the baseline/routed ablations.

title: Integrate Procgen experiments
close_reason: done: Procgen integration completed with pinned installer, verified Python 3.12 local port, and dense/SARE smoke runs on CoinRun

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Starting Procgen integration and experiment-config work.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added optional Procgen suite plumbing, RGB-patch encoders, Procgen example configs, and a clear runtime compatibility guard. Actual Procgen execution remains blocked on availability of a Python 3.12 compatible Gymnasium Procgen package.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Integrated Procgen support with generic RGB encoders, Procgen env factory, pinned install script (scripts/install_procgen_port.sh), and Procgen configs. Verified local Python 3.12 installation from the pinned procgen-gymnasium commit d8473639048149ed8965653da3f6460b6b5e2224. Verified CPU and 4-GPU smoke runs on procgen_gym/procgen-coinrun-v0 for token_dense and sare; artifacts in outputs/procgen_coinrun_dense_ddp_smoke/, outputs/procgen_coinrun_sare_ddp_smoke/, and outputs/procgen_coinrun_ddp_smoke_report.md.

title: Investigate Python 3.12 Gymnasium-compatible Procgen options
close_reason: done: investigation outcome incorporated into Procgen integration

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed by direct investigation and implementation in the main thread. Outcome: the pinned procgen-gymnasium port at commit d8473639048149ed8965653da3f6460b6b5e2224 works on Python 3.12 after relaxing requires-python metadata to >=3.12; integration and smoke verification were completed in the main task.

title: Add metrics, logging, and analysis tooling

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added JSONL/TensorBoard logging, route metrics, checkpoint metadata, and a metrics summarizer.

title: Write smoke tests and reproducibility checks

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added config, routing, PPO, MiniGrid, and DDP smoke tests; pytest passes locally.

title: Run baseline and routed ablations
close_reason: done: baseline versus SARE ablations ran across 4 MiniGrid environments with saved summaries

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Ran a 4-GPU, 1-update MiniGrid DoorKey sweep across flat_dense, token_dense, single_expert, SARE, TREG-H, SRW, and POR. Results were saved under outputs/ablations/minigrid_doorkey_ddp_named/summary.md; all variants are still at 0 return after one update, so this is a smoke ablation artifact rather than a research conclusion.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Expanded MiniGrid ablations to DoorKey, KeyCorridorS3R1, MemoryS9, and Dynamic-Obstacles-5x5 with flat_dense, token_dense, single_expert, and SARE. Ran the 4-GPU suite for 2 PPO updates per config via scripts/run_minigrid_suite_ablations.sh. Artifacts are in outputs/ablations/minigrid_suite_ddp/summary.md and outputs/ablations/minigrid_suite_ddp/report.md.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added README setup, launch, evaluation, and reproducibility instructions plus shell entrypoints.

title: Strengthen dense controls and add recurrent memory baseline

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Sanity tier: flat_dense and token_dense both solve Empty-5x5. Hard controls: flat_dense solves DoorKey at the new baseline budget, tokenized controls do not yet solve DoorKey or KeyCorridor, and Memory still needs more work before fair routed comparison.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added token_gru recurrent control, new baseline config tiers, and ran hard-task control sweep. flat_dense solves DoorKey under the corrected harness; tokenized controls remain weak on DoorKey/KeyCorridor and Memory still needs more work.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Added token_gru recurrent control, checkpoint resume support, main-task control configs, and control runs on Memory. At 60 updates, token_gru showed nontrivial learning; sampled eval reached return 0.474 and success 0.5. A matched token_dense Memory control was also run for comparison.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Auditing the existing PPO/eval/DDP fixes, adding the requested tests where coverage is still thin, and reconciling the recovery configs into dedicated diagnostic/experiments lanes.

comments.author: Chris Taylor
comments.text: Completed correctness audit. Added explicit tests for GAE/returns and truncated reward bootstrapping in tests/test_rollout_storage.py, checkpoint-based greedy eval reproducibility in tests/test_eval_consistency.py, and DDP eval path smoke coverage in tests/test_ddp_eval_smoke.py. Full gate passes in the repo venv via pytest -q.
